description: CompositionMaroon round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed collar, and bold graphic and flock print on chest  FittingRegular  Wash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print  It's time to take a break and relax.
